message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Discovery

actor "Client" as Client1
rectangle "Alias" as Alias1 {
    note right: ↪
}

Client1 -> Alias1 : HEAD

note left of Client1
  Header   Value
  Profile  <http://level3.rest/profiles/alias>,<target-profile>
  Allow    target's Allow values
  Location target URL
end note

Alias1 ..> Client1 : 307 Temporary Redirect / 308 Permanent Redirect

actor "Client" as Client2
rectangle "Alias" as Alias2 {
    note right: ↪
}

@enduml
```
